_comment: Landing page content configuration — EN version. Structured by UI blocks to facilitate i18n, CMS, and componentization.

hero._comment: Main section (above the fold). Contains value proposition, modular headline, and primary CTAs.
hero.title: Athlete Portal
hero.description: The official fight and governance platform of Final Fight Combat. We connect athletes, teams, and fans in a secure digital ecosystem with online registrations, real-time brackets, and exclusive benefits.

buttons._comment: Primary CTAs at the top of the page.

ecosystem._comment: Ecosystem architecture presentation section. Structured into technological and operational pillars.
ecosystem.title: Next-Gen
ecosystem.description: Integrated architectures designed to scale athlete credentials, real-time bracket management, and efficiency in FFC sporting events.

items._comment: Ecosystem pillars displayed as cards or grid.

tech.title: Fight Platform
tech.description: Secure registration, live bracket tracking, and official credentials for athletes and corners.

gov.title: Sports Governance
gov.description: Transparency and clear rules with unified institutional points in the official ranking.

business.title: Events & Tickets
business.description: Modern structure for ticket sales, integrated ticketing, and sponsor activations.

rwa.title: Sandbox Synergy
rwa.description: Incubation phase for partner teams and gyms to earn points in the development of the FFC ecosystem.

cta._comment: Secondary CTA for the ecosystem section.
cta.label: Explore Ecosystem

integrations._comment: Telemetry and global connectivity section. Displays real-time network, blockchain, and infrastructure metrics.
integrations.title: Global

community._comment: Social capital, governance, and assets under management scale section.
community.title: Market Potential
community.description: Final Fight Combat provides infrastructure for complete management of sporting events, ensuring fair scoring, clear rules, and community engagement through modern digital technology.

metrics._comment: Ecosystem scale indicators. Ideal for dynamic data.

hub._comment: Institutional block for synergy and partner integration.
hub.title: Network Synergy
hub.description: Governance that integrates gyms, sponsors, and spectators in a modern sports ecosystem oriented towards the development and promotion of professional fighters.

buttons._comment: Keys synchronized with t() calls from the HomeCommunity component.

team._comment: Section for team presentation and DAO council.
team.title: Our
team.description: Meet the people behind Brazil's biggest Jiu-Jitsu event. Passionate professionals dedicated to the sport and the community.

news.title: News
news.description: Stay up to date with news, technical announcements, and strategic analysis from the FFC ecosystem.

post1.title: Portal Launch: Faster and More Secure
post1.description: We have enhanced our infrastructure to ensure decentralized data flow and full on-chain auditability.

post2.title: Strategic Partnership: Academies and Web3
post2.description: Integrating martial arts schools into our sports ecosystem via digital governance.

post3.title: The Future of Professional Combat
post3.description: How FFC uses unified rankings to manage athlete progression and transparency.

roadmap.title: Our
roadmap.description: Our journey is guided by transparency and a commitment to placing the sport and fighters at the center of digital governance and professionalization.

p1.label: Phase 01
p1.title: Digital Setup & Waiting List
p1.description: System validation, venue contract and Save The Date campaign launch for strategic recruitment of teams and athletes.

p2.label: Phase 02
p2.title: Launch & Early Bird Round
p2.description: Registrations open at exclusive Early Bird prices. Secure your spot early and take advantage of the best pricing available for the competition.

p3.label: Phase 03
p3.title: Final Stretch & Closing
p3.description: Enrollment closes with the Final Round. Brackets and official schedule released for all confirmed athletes.

p4.label: Phase 04
p4.title: D-Day — The Qualifier
p4.description: Eight competition areas, defined brackets and a live system. A premium experience for every athlete stepping onto the mat.

faqs._comment: Frequently asked questions block. Compatible with accordion components.
faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.description: Everything you need to know about FFC's digital infrastructure and governance.
faqs.heading: We Have the

items.question: How can I get updates about FFC?
items.answer: Official updates about upcoming events, tickets, and schedules are published on the website and our official channels.

items.question: What is the role of FFC in athlete development?
items.answer: We provide a transparent ranking platform, security in fight brackets, and professional visibility for athletes across Brazil.

items.question: Does the event have medical support and insurance?
items.answer: Yes. All FFC stages have a specialized medical response team, on-site ambulance, and active athlete insurance for confirmed competitors.

items.question: How does credentials security work?
items.answer: Credentials are done digitally and securely via the official app, ensuring only properly registered and compliant athletes enter the arena.

cta.title: GET READY FOR
cta.description: Open registrations and limited ticket sales.

about.title: About FFC
about.subtitle: Connecting sports, technology, and the national combat community.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To elevate the professional level of combat sports in Brazil by offering a fair digital infrastructure, transparent brackets, and national visibility for athletes.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the leading and most innovative martial arts sports platform in the country, merging premium entertainment with digital governance.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: All scoring, brackets, and refereeing are transparent and auditable in real-time.

values.title: Professionalism
values.description: Professional support structures, qualified refereeing, and physical integrity for competitors.

values.title: Inclusion
values.description: Opportunities for gyms and athletes from all regions to grow within the FFC ecosystem.

athletes.title: Athletes and
athletes.description: The biggest names in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu face off in the GP for the cash prize. Do not miss it!

categories.title: CATEGORIES AND
categories.description: Choose your belt and category. Divisions are organized by weight and gender to ensure fair and balanced matches.

prizes.title: OFFICIAL
prizes.description: Recognition for the true warriors. See what is at stake on the Final Fight Combat mats.

selectives.title: SELECTIVES
selectives.subtitle: Weight Classes
selectives.description: Prizes for the champions of each weight class in the open selectives.

gp.title: GRAND PRIX
gp.subtitle: Absolute Invited
gp.description: The grand prize contested only by elite athletes invited to the GP.

community_section.title: PARTNER
community_section.description: Final Fight Combat is proud to count on the support of the largest and most respected Jiu-Jitsu teams in the world. Together, we strengthen the sport.

sponsors.title: OFFICIAL
sponsors.description: Companies and brands that strengthen the sport and make Final Fight Combat the biggest event in Brazil.

ticket_dialog.title: SECURE YOUR
ticket_dialog.description: Tickets for the largest MMA Grand Prix in Latin America are selling out fast. Secure your seat at the FFC 10 main event and prepare for war.
